article.title: Incoming UBER SWE Intern Interview
article.content:
I have my UBER SWE Intern interview round scheduled next week. It's an on campus opportunity.

I wanted to know what kind of question does UBER focus on mainly. Is it more focused on CP or they ask DSA problems like other companies like Microsoft, Google or Amazon asks.

Also what else topic could be asked in technical interviews apart from coding?

Thanks!

post.content: Try on gfg articles, which college you are from and its oncampus?
